title: coelophragmus umbrosus
intro: Coelophragmus umbrosus, also known as forest or bog geranium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits are thought to include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Coelophragmus umbrosus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
